titleStmt.title: SII 25.269: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 269. (A.R. No. 269 of 1908.) KARIVAḶAMVANDANALLŪR, SANKARANAYINAR KOYIL TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the central shrine in the Pālvaṇṇanāthasvāmi temple.
This inscription furnishes the details of date viz., Śaka 1572, Vikṛiti, Vaikāśi 6 corresponding to 1650 A.D., May 4.

It records the grant of land by śrībaṇḍārak-kāriyam-cheyvār of the temple of Tirukkaḷāvuḍaiya-tambirāṉār to meet the expenses of the festivals on the fourth day both to the above deity and the goddess, festival to be conducted to Chaṇḍeśuraru, for the pradōsha-kaṭṭaḷai to be conducted monthly and for the deity to be taken in procession; to the maṭha.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
cakāttam 1000 5 100 7 10 2 ṉ meṟ cellā
niṉṟa vikiṟuti varuṣam vaikāci mātam 6 nāḷ cuvā
mi tirukkaḷāvuṭaiyatampirāṉār ko
yiṟ cīpaṇṭārakkāriyam ceyvār
kaḷom ciṉṉattampi varakuṇapāṇṭi
ya teva vaṉṉiyaṉār cervaikāṟaṉ Aḻaka
ppaṉ vayirāyi ciṉṉārukkukkaṭṭaḷai
kkuk kalveṭṭik koṭuttapaṭi cuvā
mi nālān tiruviḻāvum Ammai
nālāntiruviḻāvum caṇṭecurar tiru
viḻāvum mātantoṟum naṭattu varukiṟa piṟa
toṭakaṭṭaḷaiyum maṭattil Eḻuntaruḷap
paṇṇinatum Ivarpuṇṇiyamāka Eṉṟe
ṉṟaikkum naṭakkumpaṭikku yiṭṭa nilattu
kku viparam periyakuḷam melaivitiyil �la
taṭikaḷ valataṭi 1 � 1 � kaṟ ñ Āka vi
tai �1(1/4)payum kiṟaiyamāka nāṅkaḷ Iva
rkku viṭṭapaṭiyiṉāle yivar Anta nilattaik ko
yilile viṭṭapaṭiyi
ṉāleyum Eṉṟeṉṟai
kkum Intap puṇṇi
yam piriyātāṉ ma
ru makaṉ ciṉṉārukku
eṉṟu nīrvārttu
k koṭuttom I
tukkiṭaiyyūṟu paṇ
ṇiṉavarkaḷ keṅ
kaikkaraiyile
kārām pacuvai
k koṉṟa toṣa
ttile povārā
kavum
Digital edition of SII 25.269 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
